values: working on SelfTrack (4h 0m) · playing Total War (30m) · taking a bath (notepad note left on screen) (30m)

4h on SelfTrack tooling but only 15m on MBTI Oracle and 0 TikTok shipped — zero motion on the actual revenue/acquisition levers. Tomorrow morning: film one Simple Rizz hook before opening the dashboard repo.

I made a new website today, which is this one. I called it self-track initially but changed it to Life of Sun.
I'm trying to figure out how I can better optimize my time for max ROI. 
I was inspired by Mark Andreessen on a podcast. He had a similar setup to track his sleep.
I hope this system gives me insight into how I can better spend my time.
